title: crinum coccineum
intro: Crinum coccineum, also known as the red lilyturf or crimson crinum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of crinum coccineum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, crinum coccineum is prepared by drying the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
